sessions.intent: Fix LLM tests and Identity test failures

before.assumptions: Identity 7/10 pass, LLM tests all throw not implemented
before.risk: Builder may convert LLM test logic

sessions.intent: Revise everything_is_data.md proposal based on design conversation

before.assumptions: Original proposal has CRTP constraint, __ prefix, DataList. Conversation refined all of these.
before.risk: Low - proposal document only, no code changes.

sessions.plan: Rewrite everything_is_data.md with: Data<T> without CRTP, . vs ! navigation, DeclaredOnly, registered navigators, no special DataList class.

actions.context: Complete rewrite of proposal incorporating design decisions from architecture conversation.

sessions.intent: Replace all CreateContext() usage with app.Context, remove CreateContext from App

before.assumptions: CreateContext creates orphan contexts. app.Context is canonical.

sessions.plan: Remove CreateContext from App/this.cs. Update all test files to use app.Context.

actions.context: Replaced all CreateContext usage with app.Context

after.notes: All CreateContext usage removed. Build succeeds with 0 errors.

sessions.intent: Replace engine.RunSteps() calls with steps.RunAsync() in tests after RunSteps removal from App

before.assumptions: RunSteps was removed from App.@this. Tests still call it. OBP says steps own their execution.
before.risk: Low - mechanical refactor, same pattern at every call site.

sessions.plan: Replace _app.RunSteps(steps, context) with steps.RunAsync(context) in 3 test files.

actions.context: Replaced all engine.RunSteps / _app.RunSteps calls with steps.RunAsync(context)

after.notes: All 14 call sites updated across 3 files.

sessions.intent: Analyze core architecture of App namespace rewrite for OBP compliance, bugs, and code quality

before.assumptions: 883 C# files changed. Need to focus on highest-impact files.
before.risk: Branch is too large for full analysis.

actions.context: 3 medium findings, 4 minor, 3 low. Verdict: NEEDS WORK.

after.notes: 3 medium findings: PrPath backslash on Linux, GoalCall parameter pollution, Newtonsoft in CommandLineParser.

sessions.intent: Test quality analysis for system-goals-architecture branch

before.assumptions: Large restructuring branch (170 new production files). Expecting coverage gaps and possibly false-green tests.
before.risk: Core execution paths may lack tests entirely. Streaming tests may be broken.

sessions.plan: 1. Run C# test suite. 2. Run Cobertura coverage. 3. Identify 0% and low-coverage files. 4. Investigate 6 streaming test failures. 5. False-green hunt on key test files. 6. Write test-report.json and verdict.

actions.context: Full test suite: 1986 total, 1980 passed, 6 failed (HTTP streaming). Coverage: 138/170 files >0%, 8 at 0%. False-green analysis on 12 test files.

after.notes: 6 test failures, 5 critical 0% coverage gaps, 15+ false-green findings. Verdict: needs-fixes.

sessions.intent: Re-review v1 fixes + fresh-eyes analysis of Executor, error/check, foreach, file module

before.assumptions: Coder fixed all v1 findings in a single commit. Need to verify fixes and check for regressions.
before.risk: STJ migration may have side effects in code that consumed Newtonsoft types.

sessions.plan: Verify fix commit (697ce1d6), trace fix-introduced data flow through Executor.cs. Fresh-eyes on error/check.cs, foreach.cs, file provider, Data.Envelope, app/run.cs.

actions.context: Fix re-review with behavioral tracing. Fresh-eyes on error handling, iteration, and file modules.

after.notes: 3 medium findings: STJ migration broke Executor file filter (fix-introduced), error.check retry hardcodes User actor, GoalCall params accumulate in foreach. 1 minor (dead Newtonsoft branch), 2 low. Verdict: NEEDS WORK.
